name: mcp-server-line-bot
description: Connects AI Agent to LINE for messaging interactions.

rating.reason: The toolset provides clear, descriptive tool names and good descriptions that explain functionality and context. Most tools include helpful warnings about broadcast behavior and adequate parameter documentation. However, the extremely complex flex message schemas with deep nesting and extensive references create readability challenges, and some parameter descriptions could be more detailed (e.g., userId defaults, rich menu ID formats).
